check.identityPass: Model emits the expected Chinese closing quote ”, identity matches official.

check.knowledgePass: Honestly answered "don't know" for unknown future events. No hallucination.
check.knowledgeFail: Did not honestly say "don't know" — possible hallucination or fabrication.
check.protocolPass: Response fields complete, fully compliant with the official protocol.
check.protocolWarn: Some fields missing but core protocol structure is intact.
check.protocolFail: Critical fields missing, protocol structure is broken.
check.responsePass: Both stage responses parsed as valid JSON.
check.responseWarn: Only single-stage probe completed, confidence reduced.
check.responseFail: Response could not be parsed or structure is corrupted.

safety.title: Safety & Privacy
safety.intro: We take your API keys and privacy seriously. The verifier runs entirely in your browser. Here are our security guarantees.
safety.localBody: All probe requests are issued directly from your browser to the endpoint you provide. No middleman server, no third-party relay — we have zero visibility into the contents.
safety.keyBody: Your API key is only held in memory to authenticate the direct upstream call. We don't store it, don't log it, don't persist it. Closing the page wipes it completely.
safety.historyBody: Verification records are saved in your browser's localStorage and never include the API key. You can clear them in one click. Records do not sync across devices.
safety.algoBody: Two-stage probe: a symbol probe verifies character-level identity, a knowledge-cutoff probe verifies honesty. The algorithm is fully open source — readable in this page's source code.
safety.reminder: We recommend running the test with a dedicated short-lived key and revoking it afterward. This tool provides a heuristic signal — combine it with real production behavior for a final judgment.

cta.title: First-Party Models · Full Power
cta.desc: Every model is sourced directly from the official provider — zero downgrades, full capability. Enterprise-grade HA architecture ensures rock-solid stability, with global edge nodes for the fastest response times.

translation.高危状态码重试风险告知与免责声明Markdown:
### ⚠️ High-Risk Operation: Risk Notice and Disclaimer for 504/524 Retry
By default, this project does not retry for status codes `400` (bad request), `504` (gateway timeout), and `524` (timeout occurred).
 In many cases, 504 and 524 mean the request has reached the upstream AI service and processing has started, but the connection was closed due to long processing time.

Enabling redirection/retry for these timeout status codes is a **high-risk operation**. Before enabling it, you must read and understand the consequences below:

#### 1. Core Risks (Read Carefully)
1. 💸 Duplicate/multiple billing risk: Most upstream AI providers **still charge** for requests that started processing but got interrupted by network timeout (504/524). If retry is triggered, a new upstream request will be sent, which can lead to **duplicate or multiple charges**.
2. ⏳ Severe client timeout: If a single request already timed out, adding retries can multiply total latency and cause severe or unacceptable timeout behavior for your final client/caller.
3. 💥 Request backlog and system crash risk: Forcing retries on timeout requests keeps threads and connections occupied for longer. Under high concurrency, this can cause serious backlog, exhaust system resources, trigger a cascading failure, and crash your proxy service.

#### 2. Risk Acknowledgement
If you still choose to enable this feature, you acknowledge all of the following:

translation.高危状态码重试风险确认项1: I have fully read and understood the risks and fully understand the destructive consequences of forcing retries for status codes 504 and 524.
translation.高危状态码重试风险确认项2: I have communicated with the upstream provider and confirmed that the timeout issue is an upstream bottleneck and cannot be resolved upstream at this time.
translation.高危状态码重试风险确认项3: I voluntarily accept all duplicate/multiple billing risks and will not file issues or complaints in this project repository regarding billing anomalies caused by this retry behavior.
translation.高危状态码重试风险确认项4: I voluntarily accept system stability risks, including severe client timeout and possible service crash. Any consequences caused by enabling this feature are my own responsibility.

translation.settings.securityInfraDesc: Manage your authentication methods, session keys, and account integrity. We recommend rotating keys every 90 days.
translation.查询 API Key 在各平台的剩余额度: Check remaining balance of API Keys across platforms
translation.查询 API Key 在各平台的剩余额度、已用量和到期时间。支持 OpenAI、: Check remaining balance, usage, and expiration of API Keys across platforms. Supports OpenAI, DeepSeek, Moonshot, and other major providers as well as OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
translation.您的 API Key 仅用于向对应平台发起余额查询请求，查询完成后不会被存储或记: Your API Key is only used to send a balance query to the corresponding provider. It is not stored or logged after the query.
translation.查询请求通过本站服务端中转至目标平台，以避免浏览器跨域限制。: Queries are proxied through our server to the target platform to bypass browser CORS restrictions.
translation.本项目完全开源，您可以审查源代码以确认安全性。如仍有顾虑，建议在查询后轮换您的: This project is fully open-source — you can audit the source code to verify. If you still have concerns, we recommend rotating your Key after querying.
translation.以及所有兼容 OpenAI 计费接口的第三方平台: and all third-party platforms compatible with the OpenAI billing API
translation.Claude 不提供余额查询接口，仅支持通过 Admin API Key 查询本: Claude does not provide a balance API. Only monthly cost can be queried via Admin API Key.
translation.需要使用 Admin API Key（以 sk-ant-admin- 开头），普: An Admin API Key (starting with sk-ant-admin-) is required. Regular API Keys cannot be used.
translation.Admin Key 拥有较高权限，请在查询后及时删除或轮换。: Admin Keys have elevated permissions. Please delete or rotate them after querying.
translation.Grok 余额查询需要 Management API Key（非推理用 API: Grok balance query requires a Management API Key (not the inference API Key) and a Team ID.
translation.获取 Team ID：在 xAI Console 的 Team 页面 URL 中: Get Team ID: Found in the Team page URL of xAI Console, format: team_xxxxxxxx.
translation.Management Key 拥有账户管理权限，请在查询后及时删除或轮换。: Management Keys have account management permissions. Please delete or rotate them after querying.
translation.计算 Prompt Caching 能节省多少成本: Calculate how much Prompt Caching can save
translation.计算使用 Prompt Caching 后能节省多少成本。将 System Pr: Calculate cost savings from Prompt Caching. Cache fixed content like System Prompts and compare standard vs cached pricing.
translation.Prompt Caching 将固定不变的内容（如 System Prompt、: Prompt Caching stores fixed content (System Prompts, few-shot examples) so subsequent requests reuse the cache instead of reprocessing.
translation.首次请求按写入价格计费（通常等于或略高于标准价），后续命中缓存按缓存读取价格计费: The first request is charged at the write price (usually equal to or slightly above standard). Subsequent cache hits are charged at the read price (typically 10%-50% of standard).
Paste your System Prompt or other fixed content...
translation.关于服务的一切，你想知道的都在这里: Everything you need to know about our service
translation.支持 40+ 主流 AI 模型，包括 Claude 全系列（Opus、Sonne: We support 40+ mainstream AI models including the full Claude family (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku), GPT-4o/GPT-5, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok, Qwen, Moonshot, and more. Models are continuously updated to sync with upstream releases.
translation.支持哪些工具和 IDE？: What tools and IDEs are supported?
translation.兼容所有支持 OpenAI API 格式的工具：Claude Code、Code: Compatible with all OpenAI API-format tools: Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor, VS Code (Continue/Cline), JetBrains AI, Cherry Studio, ChatBox, and more. Also natively supports Claude Messages and Gemini formats.
translation.按实际 Token 用量计费，充值余额永不过期。每次 API 调用会实时显示消耗: Billed by actual token usage. Credits never expire. Each API call displays real-time token consumption and cost. Detailed usage logs and bills are available anytime in the console.
translation.国内能直接用吗？: Can I use it from China without a VPN?
translation.可以直接使用，无需额外网络工具。我们提供国内可直连的 API 端点，针对国内网络: Yes, it works directly without any extra network tools. We provide API endpoints accessible from mainland China, optimized for low latency and high availability.
translation.服务稳定性怎么保障？: How do you ensure service stability?
translation.企业级 SLA 保障，多节点负载均衡和自动故障转移。内置智能渠道路由，单一渠道异: Enterprise-grade SLA with multi-node load balancing and automatic failover. Built-in intelligent channel routing automatically switches when a channel fails. Real-time status monitoring is available in the console.
translation.可以创建多个 API Key 吗？: Can I create multiple API Keys?
translation.可以。每个账户支持创建多个 API Key，并可为每个 Key 单独设置额度上限: Yes. Each account can create multiple API Keys with individual quota limits, model permissions, and expiration dates. Ideal for managing by project or team member.
translation.支持。我们提供企业专属方案，包括独立部署、专属渠道、优先技术支持、自定义 SLA: Yes. We offer enterprise plans including dedicated deployment, exclusive channels, priority support, custom SLAs, and volume discounts. Contact
translation.了解我们的最新功能、改进和修复。: See our latest features, improvements, and fixes.
translation.实时监控所有服务的运行状态。: Real-time monitoring of all service operations.
translation.暂时无法获取服务状态，请稍后刷新。: Unable to fetch service status. Please refresh later.
translation.暂无监控数据。管理员可在后台配置 Uptime Kuma 监控。: No monitoring data. Admins can configure Uptime Kuma in settings.
translation.无需注册，输入您的 API Key 即可立即体验。支持流式输出，实时查看模型响应: No registration required. Enter your API Key to try immediately. Supports streaming output.
translation.您的 API Key 仅在浏览器中使用，直接从浏览器发送请求到 API 端点，不: Your API Key is used only in the browser. Requests go directly from your browser to the API endpoint, not through our server.
translation.您的账户已准备就绪。只需 3 步，即可开始使用 AI API。: Your account is ready. Just 3 steps to start using AI API.
translation.前往令牌管理页面，创建您的第一个 API Key。您可以为不同项目创建不同的 K: Go to Token Management to create your first API Key. You can create different Keys for different projects.
translation.复制下方地址，在您的代码或工具中配置 API Base URL，即可开始调用。: Copy the URL below, configure the API Base URL in your code or tool, and start calling.
translation.企业级架构，为每一次调用保驾护航: Enterprise architecture that safeguards every API call
translation.您的 AI 系统正在高效运行中。以下是今日的模型使用概览。: Your AI systems are operating at peak efficiency. Here is today's model usage overview.
translation.您的 API 环境已隔离并安全保护。: Your API environment is isolated and secured.
translation.内置 40+ 模型供应商适配器，自动选择最优渠道。支持故障转移、负载均衡和 Pr: Built-in 40+ model provider adapters with automatic optimal channel selection. Supports failover, load balancing, and Prompt Caching to reduce costs while ensuring quality for every API call.
translation.系统根据查询复杂度和渠道健康状态，自动将请求路由到最优的模型集群，确保最佳性价比: The system automatically routes requests to the optimal model cluster based on query complexity and channel health, ensuring the best cost-performance ratio.
translation.内置请求审计与敏感词过滤，API Key 权限隔离，支持 2FA 和 OAuth: Built-in request auditing, sensitive word filtering, API Key permission isolation, 2FA and OAuth multi-factor authentication to meet enterprise security requirements.
translation.一个端点兼容 OpenAI、Claude Messages、Gemini 三大: One endpoint compatible with OpenAI, Claude Messages, and Gemini API formats — no need to maintain different integration code for different models.
translation.实时资源分配与消耗趋势: Real-time resource allocation and consumption trends
translation.统一管理 40+ AI 供应商。优雅、精确且专为现代 AI 开发者打造的 API: Unified gateway for 40+ AI providers. Elegant, precise, and luminously designed for the modern AI developer.
translation.40+ 官方模型一手接入，零中间商。每一次请求都经过原始 API 验证，确保模型: 40+ official models with direct access, zero middlemen. Every request is verified through the original API, ensuring model authenticity, blazing speed, and transparent pricing.
translation.登录您的账户以继续使用 API 服务: Sign in to your account to continue using API services.
translation.注册以开始使用 AI 服务: Sign up to start using AI services.
translation.guide_tooltip: Zero experience needed -- step-by-step tutorials for every use case
translation.guide_subtitle: No experience needed. Follow the step-by-step tutorials to get up and running.
translation.guide_coding_desc: Let AI write code, fix bugs, and review your code -- supports Cursor, Claude Code, Cline, and more
translation.guide_chat_desc: Chat with AI models through beautiful third-party clients like ChatGPT Next Web, LobeChat
translation.guide_code_desc: Call AI models directly via OpenAI SDK (Python / Node.js / Go) or HTTP API
translation.guide_image_desc: Generate stunning images with DALL-E, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion and more
translation.guide_music_desc: Create original music and songs with AI using Suno
translation.guide_video_desc: Generate videos from text or images with Kling, Runway and more
translation.guide_tts_desc: Convert text to natural-sounding speech with OpenAI TTS, Azure TTS
translation.guide_stt_desc: Transcribe audio to text with Whisper
translation.guide_embeddings_desc: Generate text embeddings for RAG, knowledge bases, and semantic search
translation.guide_translation_desc: Use API tokens with Immersive Translate, Bob Translate and other translation tools
translation.guide_not_found: Can't find what you're looking for?
translation.guide_prerequisites_desc: Gmail registration, VPS selection, network setup, and everything you need before getting started
translation.prereq_page_desc: Everything you need to prepare before using AI API services. Follow the sections in order. Note: these are general tutorials -- not all steps are required to use our platform. Pick only what applies to you.
translation.prereq_done_desc: You've completed all the preparation. Now pick a tool and start using the API.
translation.prereq_email_why: Most AI services and tools require an email account for registration. A Gmail (Google) account is the most widely accepted -- it works with almost every service you'll encounter.
translation.prereq_email_gmail_title: How to register a Gmail account
translation.prereq_email_step2: Fill in your name, choose a username (this becomes your email address)
translation.prereq_email_step3: Set a strong password (mix of letters, numbers, and symbols)
translation.prereq_email_step4: Add a recovery phone number for security (you may need this for verification)
translation.prereq_email_step5: Complete the verification and agree to the terms of service
translation.prereq_email_tip: If you can't access Google, Outlook and ProtonMail are good alternatives that work with most services.
translation.prereq_link_gmail_desc: The most widely accepted email, works everywhere
translation.prereq_link_outlook_desc: Microsoft's free email, no special network access needed
translation.prereq_link_proton_desc: Privacy-focused email from Switzerland, free tier available
translation.prereq_network_why: Some AI APIs (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, etc.) are hosted overseas. Depending on your location, you may need special network tools to connect reliably. If you can already access google.com, you can skip this section.
translation.prereq_network_how_title: How to set up network access
translation.prereq_network_step1: Choose a trusted network service provider from the resources below
translation.prereq_network_step2: Register an account and purchase a plan (monthly plans are usually cheapest to start)
translation.prereq_network_step3: Follow the provider's setup guide to install and configure the client on your device
translation.prereq_network_tip: Once configured, verify by visiting google.com. If it loads, you're all set. Most providers have setup guides for Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android.
translation.prereq_link_jms_desc: Operated by the BandwagonHost team, stable and reliable
translation.prereq_vps_why: A VPS (Virtual Private Server) is only needed if you want to self-host tools, run code 24/7, or deploy your own services. If you're just calling the API from your local machine, you can skip this.
translation.prereq_vps_how_title: How to choose and set up a VPS
translation.prereq_vps_step1: Pick a provider and plan -- 2 CPU cores + 4GB RAM is enough for most use cases
translation.prereq_vps_step2: Choose a location close to you or to the AI API servers (US West Coast is ideal for OpenAI/Claude)
translation.prereq_vps_step3: Select Ubuntu 22.04 or Debian 12 as the operating system (most tutorials assume Linux)
translation.prereq_vps_step4: After creation, note down the IP address, username, and password from the provider's dashboard
translation.prereq_link_racknerd_desc: Extremely affordable, US West Coast, great for beginners
translation.prereq_link_bwg_desc: CN2 GIA premium routes, fast access from China
translation.prereq_link_vultr_desc: Hourly billing, global datacenters, easy to scale
translation.prereq_terminal_why: If you have a VPS, you'll need an SSH client to connect to it. These tools let you run commands on your remote server from your computer.
translation.prereq_terminal_step1: Download and install one of the tools below
translation.prereq_terminal_step2: Open the tool, create a new connection with your VPS IP, username (usually 'root'), and password
translation.prereq_terminal_step3: Click connect -- you should see a terminal prompt, meaning you're logged in
translation.prereq_link_finalshell_desc: Free, with built-in server monitoring (Chinese UI)
translation.prereq_payment_why: To top up your account and start using the API, you'll need a payment method. We support multiple options to make it easy.
translation.prereq_payment_step1: WeChat Pay / Alipay -- scan the QR code on the top-up page (most convenient in China)
translation.prereq_payment_step2: Credit/Debit Card -- Visa, Mastercard, etc. via the payment gateway
translation.prereq_payment_step3: Crypto / USDT -- contact support for manual top-up if you prefer cryptocurrency
translation.prereq_payment_tip: Remember: unused balance can be refunded at any time. Start with a small amount (e.g. 1 CNY) to try it out first.
translation.prereq_vps_tip: Not sure which to pick? Start with RackNerd or VMISS — they're cheap enough to experiment with, and you can always migrate later. You can also email support@aggretoken.com — our team will help evaluate your needs and recommend a plan, free of charge.
translation.prereq_link_vmiss_desc: Great value, multiple Asia-Pacific locations, stable performance
translation.prereq_link_gomami_desc: Asia-optimized routes, good for users in Asia-Pacific region
translation.prereq_link_vps_desc: European premium provider, excellent EU/US locations
translation.prereq_link_evoxt_desc: Global locations, flexible billing, beginner-friendly control panel
translation.prereq_link_zorocloud_desc: China-optimized routes, CN2/BGP lines, fast domestic access
translation.prereq_link_zgocloud_desc: Hong Kong & Asia locations, low latency from mainland China
translation.prereq_link_lisahost_desc: China-optimized lines, CN2 GIA/BGP, good for domestic users
translation.prereq_link_yinnet_desc: Stable provider with consistent uptime and reliable service
translation.prereq_link_lxy_desc: Reliable service, multiple protocols, good balance of speed and stability (recommended for beginners)
translation.prereq_link_fny_desc: Fast speeds, optimized for streaming and low-latency use cases
translation.prereq_link_pyjc_desc: Budget-friendly plans, great for light usage and getting started
translation.prereq_link_bkm_desc: Stable connections, consistent performance, long-running provider
translation.prereq_link_xs_desc: Premium lines, high-speed nodes, best for demanding use cases
translation.prereq_network_diy_desc: If you enjoy tinkering or care about privacy, you can build your own proxy node on a VPS. Here's how they compare:
translation.prereq_cmp_privacy_airport: Traffic passes through the provider's servers
translation.prereq_cmp_privacy_self: You control everything, no third-party access
translation.prereq_cmp_speed_airport: Usually fast, many optimized nodes available
translation.prereq_cmp_speed_self: Depends on your VPS, single node, but exclusive bandwidth
translation.prereq_cmp_stability_airport: Provider handles maintenance, failover across nodes
translation.prereq_cmp_stability_self: You maintain it yourself, single point of failure
translation.prereq_cmp_cost_airport: Monthly subscription, usually cheaper for casual use
translation.prereq_cmp_cost_self: VPS cost + your time, but no usage limits
translation.prereq_cmp_difficulty_airport: Download app, scan QR code, done
translation.prereq_cmp_difficulty_self: Need to install & configure on a VPS (30-60 min for beginners)
translation.prereq_cmp_control_airport: Limited to what the provider offers
translation.prereq_cmp_control_self: Full control over protocol, encryption, routing rules
translation.prereq_network_disclaimer: This site does not promote or sell any network proxy services. The resources below are provided solely as a reference for beginners who are unfamiliar with such tools, to help you access overseas AI services. Links contain referral codes, which do not affect the price you pay. Please comply with local laws and regulations.
translation.prereq_vps_disclaimer: This site does not promote or sell any VPS or cloud server services. translation.数据路由与暂存：本平台主要提供 API 流量路由与资源池分发服务。为保障通信效率: Data routing: This platform primarily provides API traffic routing and resource pool distribution services. To ensure communication efficiency, request data is only transiently forwarded at the gateway layer. The platform does not actively collect, permanently store, or use user data for any form of secondary model training.
translation.安全审查机制：平台部署自动化安全风控策略，对于高频触发敏感词拦截或表现出异常调用: Security review: The platform deploys automated security risk control policies. Accounts that frequently trigger sensitive word filters or exhibit abnormal usage patterns will have their API access automatically suspended.
